objections.description: Client-side heuristic inference of normative status (revocation/vigency) creates strict liability exposure. The audit correctly identifies this as a blocker but incorrectly proposes a 'Status não verificado' tri-state fallback. Rendering any status badge—even neutral gray—implies system verification and creates reliance. Heuristic logic must be excised entirely from the frontend bundle, not merely hidden behind feature flags. The component currently uses text pattern matching (revogado/revogada) on raw document content without authoritative cross-reference, which is malpractice-adjacent for legal research tools.
objections.suggested_fix: Remove all client-side status inference. Implement backend service that queries official consolidated feeds (Planalto/LexML) with circuit-breaker pattern. Frontend renders only: (1) 'Vigente per [source] em [timestamp]' with hyperlink to official consolidated text, or (2) 'Consultar texto consolidado' link with NO status badge. Delete heuristic detection code; do not retain in debug views as it trains devs to rely on it.

objections.description: sessionStorage-based state recovery for mobile workflows fails professional requirements. sessionStorage is scoped to tab and does not survive 'Open in New Tab', browser crashes, or iOS background termination. Legal researchers frequently open multiple acts in parallel for comparison; sessionStorage isolation breaks this workflow and causes data loss during cross-referencing.
objections.suggested_fix: Replace sessionStorage with URL-encoded state serialization (query params for filters, hash for scroll position). Implement compressState/decompressState utilities using URLSearchParams and lz-string for long queries. State must be shareable via URL copy-paste across devices and survive browser restart.

objections.description: Absence of deterministic boolean query operators (AND/OR/NOT/NEAR) makes the tool unsuitable for exhaustive legal research (investigation-grade). Natural language interpretation provides convenience but cannot guarantee recall completeness required for regulatory compliance searches or litigation holds. The audit's suggestion to defer boolean implementation pending user research is unacceptable—legal certainty requires deterministic query control as a baseline, not an advanced feature.
objections.suggested_fix: Implement strict boolean query parser in search service with operator precedence. Add 'Modo Determinístico' toggle in UI that disables NLP interpretation and exposes syntax helper. Default mode can remain NLP, but professional mode must guarantee that 'A AND B' returns intersection, not semantic similarity results.

objections.description: localStorage persistence of reading history creates GDPR/privacy liability and data integrity risks. Browser storage is accessible to any script on domain (XSS exposure) and lacks encryption at rest. For a tool handling potentially sensitive legal research (M&A, litigation), this is a security gap.
objections.suggested_fix: Encrypt localStorage values using AES-GCM with user-derived key (derived from password or ephemeral session) before storage. Add 'Limpar dados locais' kill-switch. Alternatively, remove client-side persistence entirely until authenticated server-side storage is implemented.

objections.description: Missing content integrity verification. Professional legal tools must prove document authenticity at time of access (for evidence authentication). No cryptographic hashing (SHA-256) of document content is mentioned, creating evidentiary chain gaps.
objections.suggested_fix: Compute SHA-256 hash of document content on fetch, display 'Hash de integridade: [truncated]' in document metadata panel with copy-to-clipboard. Store hash with timestamp in search session log for audit trails.

objections.description: Filter chips for inferred filters are read-only. The audit notes this but the implementation appears to render them as static badges. Without bidirectional editing, users cannot override misinterpretations without rewriting queries, violating direct manipulation principles.
objections.suggested_fix: Implement Chip component with onDelete and onEdit handlers. Clicking chip opens inline edit (dropdown for enums, text for dates). Add 'Ignorar interpretação' button that switches to raw query mode with current tokens displayed.

suggestions.description: Add 'Exportar Protocolo de Busca' feature that generates a PDF/A or structured JSON receipt containing: exact query timestamp, filters applied, result count, SHA-256 of result list, and user session ID. This creates defensible audit trails for court filings showing methodology was exhaustive.

Implement 'Cadeia de Revogações' visualization showing transitive closure of revocation relationships (A revoga B, B revoga C). Professional researchers need to see the full tree of obsolescence, not just immediate parent/child links.

Add request/response interception for 'Prefer: return=representation' headers to enable differential updates (ETag-based caching) of normative status without full document re-fetch, reducing bandwidth for polling scenarios.
